description: Runtime parity and release mirror manifest for Project GD. Three bundles: gd_command (strict parity), codex_l1_audit_mirror (release mirror completeness), codex_l2_audit_mirror (release mirror completeness). Gate types are explicitly labelled: [PARITY] or [RELEASE_MIRROR].

release_gate_exit_codes.10: mirror_incomplete — sync not run or incomplete; run bin/gd-sync-codex-chain.sh --apply
release_gate_exit_codes.11: manifest_sync_drift — manifest excluded_patterns do not match sync script actual behavior
release_gate_exit_codes.12: secret_found — secret token found in mirror file (after redaction); manual review required
release_gate_exit_codes.13: untracked_release_files — expected release files are untracked in git
release_gate_exit_codes.14: l1_must_include_missing — one or more L1 must_include files absent or hash mismatch
release_gate_exit_codes.15: l2_denominator_unclassified — at least one L2 top-level entry has no INCLUDE/MANIFEST_ONLY/EXCLUDE classification

review2_command.description: /review2 profile-aware Codex workbench command: Project GD source → plugin marketplace runtime (~/.claude/plugins/marketplaces/project-gd-marketplace/commands/review2.md). FR-007 retires the legacy ~/.claude/commands/ copy (plugin-distributed); strict parity checks source vs marketplace runtime. apply_requires_explicit_authorization + install_script retained for the legacy manual-install path only.

gd_command.description: /gd Claude command: Project GD source → plugin marketplace runtime (~/.claude/plugins/marketplaces/project-gd-marketplace/commands/gd.md). FR-007 retires the legacy ~/.claude/commands/ copy (plugin-distributed, no command copy written); strict parity checks source vs marketplace runtime.

codex_l1_audit_mirror.description: L1 Codex binary release mirror. Captures standalone binary snapshot. NOTE: Codex migrated from npm (@openai/codex v0.130) to standalone binary (v0.136+). runtime_base updated accordingly. Gate: release_mirror completeness — version lock file present and hash-verified against runtime.
codex_l1_audit_mirror.migration_note: npm v0.130 path ~/.npm-global/lib/node_modules/@openai/codex is defunct. Standalone binary at ~/.codex/packages/standalone/. Binary is Mach-O arm64 native (not Node.js). mirror must_include updated to version-lock only.

must_include.description: Version lock — standalone layout manifest (layoutVersion, version, target, entrypoint)

codex_l1_audit_mirror.exclusion_reason: node_modules/ vendored dependency tree — not committed to avoid size and license concerns; cache and log files are runtime ephemera

codex_l2_audit_mirror.description: L2 Codex config/memories/skills/automations release mirror. Release mirror completeness: all top-level entries classified; INCLUDE_FULL content committed; MANIFEST_ONLY metadata committed; EXCLUDE content not committed.

include_full.description: Content committed verbatim (after secret redaction). User/version data only — low churn.

top_level_files.name: AGENTS.md
top_level_files.note: User agent instructions; 7496 bytes as of 2026-06-04 (mirror drift: was recorded as empty — run gd-sync-codex-chain.sh --apply to refresh)

directories.name: rules/
directories.note: default.rules contains API key — redact before commit

directories.name: memories/
directories.note: User-authored memory snippets; no secrets expected

directories.name: automations/
directories.note: User automation scripts; no secrets expected

manifest_only.description: Only metadata committed (name, version, sha256, file_count, total_bytes, license). Full content NOT committed — upstream or frequently-changing assets.

top_level_files.name: models_cache.json
top_level_files.note: Runtime model list cache — high churn, metadata sufficient

top_level_files.name: cloud-requirements-cache.json
top_level_files.note: Cloud dependency cache — high churn, metadata sufficient

top_level_files.name: .codex-global-state.json
top_level_files.note: Runtime state — changes on every session, metadata sufficient

directories.name: skills/
directories.note: User-installed skills — 1473 files; manifest records name+version+sha256

directories.name: computer-use/
directories.note: Computer-use assets — 158 files; upstream assets, manifest only

directories.name: plugins/
directories.note: Plugin files — 1626 files; upstream/third-party, manifest only

exclude.description: Content NOT committed. Privacy, security, runtime-state, or size reasons.

top_level_files.name: session_index.jsonl
top_level_files.reason: session index — pairs with excluded sessions/

directories.name: vendor_imports/
directories.reason: vendored dependency tree — 839 files, size/license concerns

directories.name: packages/
directories.reason: standalone binary packages — large runtime assets, not committed

top_level_files_added_2026_06.name: .codex-global-state.json.tmp-*
top_level_files_added_2026_06.reason: transient temp write of global state — ephemeral

top_level_files_added_2026_06.name: chrome-native-hosts-v2.json
top_level_files_added_2026_06.reason: chrome native messaging hosts — host-specific, ephemeral

top_level_files_added_2026_06.name: chrome-native-hosts.json
top_level_files_added_2026_06.reason: chrome native messaging hosts legacy — host-specific, ephemeral
